content: The system must prevent moving to BUILD mode without passing QA validation.
After completing the CREATIVE phase, trigger a message to prompt for QA validation by asking the user to type 'VAN QA'.
After successful QA validation, trigger a message to allow the user to proceed to BUILD mode by typing 'BUILD'.
When the user manually types 'BUILD', the system must check the QA status before allowing access.
On QA SUCCESS, the workflow must continue to BUILD mode; on QA FAILURE, it must return to the QA validation process.
